description: Repo-tracked target for the latest diagnostics report snapshot. This file is intentionally replaced with the newest generated report payload when a report is reviewed through the GitHub connector.

workflow.browser: Run Studio Diagnostics and use Copy Snapshot for Repo or Save Snapshot File.
workflow.repo: Replace this file with the generated payload through a trusted GitHub write path.
workflow.safety: GitHub Pages cannot safely write this file automatically without a backend or GitHub App.
